# AI Disclaimer:
#
# This file is generated by codex (AI coding agnet) against the codebase with
# human review and feedback

include(FetchContent)

FetchContent_Declare(
  CLI11
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/CLIUtils/CLI11.git
  GIT_TAG v2.4.2
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(CLI11)

FetchContent_Declare(
  tomlplusplus
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/marzer/tomlplusplus.git
  GIT_TAG v3.4.0
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(tomlplusplus)

FetchContent_Declare(
  magic_enum
  GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/Neargye/magic_enum.git
  GIT_TAG v0.9.7
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(magic_enum)

add_library(gpjson-driver_config driver_config.cpp)
target_include_directories(gpjson-driver_config
  PUBLIC
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
)
target_link_libraries(gpjson-driver_config
  PUBLIC
    gpjson-cpp_lib
    CLI11::CLI11
    magic_enum::magic_enum
    tomlplusplus::tomlplusplus
)

add_executable(gpjson_driver main.cpp)
target_link_libraries(gpjson_driver PRIVATE gpjson-driver_config)
add_executable(gpjson-cpp ALIAS gpjson_driver)
